3031170.name: Wizard Duel
3031170.description:
ARE YOU READY FOR MAGIC LIKE YOU'VE NEVER SEEN BEFORE?

Forget dusty spellbooks and charming enchantments. Wizard Duel throws arcane mastery into the brutal arena of high-stakes kombat! This is where legendary figures shed their storybook personas and unleash raw, untamed power in visceral 1v1 duels.

Master devastating spell combos, parry lethal hexes with expert wand work, and shatter your opponents with magic-infused force. Choose your champion from a roster of reimagined myths and legends, each bringing their unique brand of lethal sorcery to the fight:

  • Merlin: The Arch-Mage, wielding elemental fury and arcane constructs.

  • Morgan Le Fay: The Dark Sorceress, ensnaring foes with forbidden magic and illusions.

  • Krampus: The Yuletide Terror, punishing opponents with chains, claws, and icy dread.

  • Anansi: The Trickster God, weaving webs of deceit and striking with venomous speed.

  • Midas: The Golden King, transmuting defenses and turning fortunes with his cursed touch.

  • Lilith: The First Demoness, dominating with seductive dark arts and life-siphoning power.

  • Titania: The Faerie Queen, commanding nature's wrath and ethereal, deadly enchantments.

FEATURES:

  • Intense Magic-Fueled Combat: Experience a deep fighting system where spells pack a visceral punch and strategic wand play is key.

  • Legendary Roster Reimagined: Master unique fighters drawn from global myth and folklore, each with distinct abilities, playstyles, and devastating ultimate spells.

  • Brutal Finishes: Obliterate your weakened opponents with spectacular and merciless magical finishing moves. (Think arcane fatalities!)

  • Wand is Your Weapon: More than just a focus, your wand is integral to blocking, parrying, and unleashing powerful attacks.

  • Mythic Arenas: Battle across stunning, dynamic arenas inspired by the legends themselves.

🔥 PLAY THE DEMO DURING STEAM NEXT FEST! 🔥

Get your first taste of magical brutality! Experience the core combat, unleash devastating spells, and try out a selection of legendary wizards firsthand in our limited-time demo, available exclusively during Steam Next Fest. Don't miss your chance to duel!

The legends are gathering. The duel is set. Will you claim arcane supremacy or be turned to dust?

Wishlist Wizard Duel today and prepare for the DEMO during Steam Next Fest!
